scripts.ci:core: sh -c 'export DATABASE_URL="${DATABASE_URL:-postgres://ironclad:ironclad@127.0.0.1:5432/ironclad_auth}" && export KEY_ENCRYPTION_SECRET="${KEY_ENCRYPTION_SECRET:-ci-key-encryption-secret-16+}" && export IRONCLAD_ISSUER="${IRONCLAD_ISSUER:-https://ironclad.ci.example/}" && export IRONCLAD_TOKEN_AUDIENCE="${IRONCLAD_TOKEN_AUDIENCE:-https://resources.ci.example/}" && pnpm db:migrate && pnpm db:seed && pnpm lint && pnpm build && pnpm test && pnpm exec playwright install chromium --with-deps && E2E_SKIP_DB_PREP=1 pnpm e2e'
